meta.reconciliation_note: Founder reconciliation closed 2026-04-18. Canonical values: avg_deal_size $24K, gross_margin 82%, cac_payback 12 months, nrr 120%, arr_y3 display $32.2M, ltv_cac 5:1. Prior drift closed: $28K (build_deck.py stat strips) → $24K; 75%+ → 82%; 4 months / 18mo / '4 mo' → 12 months; 130%+ / 118%+ → 120%; $32.17M precision variant discarded (display-only canonical is $32.2M). 8.4× and 2.3x LTV/CAC duplicates removed; both surfaces now render canonical 5:1. See ADR-004 and docs/03-inventory/deal-size-drift-note.md.
